question: How long does delivery take?
answer: Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days. Express delivery takes 1-2 business days and costs extra.

question: Do you deliver on weekends?
answer: Yes, we deliver on Saturdays. Sunday delivery is available in select areas for an extra charge.

question: How much is the delivery charge?
answer: Delivery is free on orders above Rs. 500. For smaller orders, a flat Rs. 40 delivery charge applies.

question: Do you offer free shipping?
answer: Yes, orders above Rs. 500 qualify for free standard shipping.

question: How do I return a product?
answer: To return a product, go to your order history, select the item, and click 'Initiate Return'. We accept returns within 7 days of delivery.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: We offer a 7-day return policy on most items. Products must be unused and in original packaging. Perishable items cannot be returned.

question: How do I track a return?
answer: Once your return is picked up, you will receive a tracking ID via email. Use that ID on our returns portal to check the status.

question: Can I exchange a product?
answer: Yes, exchanges are allowed within 7 days of delivery for the same product in a different size or variant, subject to availability.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept UPI, credit and debit cards, net banking, wallets (Paytm, PhonePe), and cash on delivery.

question: Can I pay with UPI?
answer: Yes, UPI payments are fully supported. You can use Google Pay, PhonePe, BHIM, or any UPI app.

question: Is cash on delivery available?
answer: Yes, cash on delivery is available for orders up to Rs. 5000. Not available for express delivery slots.

question: What are your business hours?
answer: Our customer support is available Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 9 PM IST. The chatbot is available 24/7.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can chat with us here, email support@quickserve.ai, or call 1800-123-4567 (toll-free, Mon-Sat 9AM-9PM).

question: Where are you located?
answer: Our fulfilment centres are in Bangalore, Mumbai, and Delhi. We ship pan-India.

question: How do I track my order?
answer: Just tell me your order ID (e.g. ORD123) and I can pull the status for you right here in the chat.

question: How do I cancel an order?
answer: You can cancel an order before it is dispatched. Tell me your order ID and I will cancel it for you.

question: Can I modify my order after placing it?
answer: Yes, orders can be modified within 30 minutes of placing them, before they enter processing. Share your order ID and the changes you want.

question: What happens if my order is late?
answer: If your order is more than 2 days late, contact support and we will issue a refund or re-delivery at no extra cost.

question: Is my payment information secure?
answer: Yes, all transactions use 256-bit SSL encryption. We do not store card details on our servers.

question: Do you have a loyalty or rewards program?
answer: Yes, every purchase earns QuickPoints. 100 QuickPoints = Rs. 10 off your next order. Points are credited within 24 hours of delivery.

question: Can I place a bulk order?
answer: Yes, for bulk orders above Rs. 10,000, contact our B2B team at bulk@quickserve.ai for special pricing.

question: What if I receive a damaged product?
answer: We're sorry to hear that. Share a photo via email to support@quickserve.ai or raise a complaint in the app. We will arrange a free replacement or full refund.

question: Do you offer gift wrapping?
answer: Yes, gift wrapping is available for Rs. 50 per item. You can add this option during checkout.

question: How do I apply a coupon code?
answer: Enter your coupon code in the 'Apply Coupon' field at checkout. The discount will be applied automatically if the code is valid.

question: Why was my payment declined?
answer: Payments can be declined due to insufficient funds, wrong card details, or bank security checks. Try a different payment method or contact your bank.

question: What is the minimum order amount?
answer: There is no minimum order amount. However, delivery charges apply for orders under Rs. 500.

question: Can I schedule a delivery for a specific time?
answer: Yes, during checkout you can choose a preferred delivery slot: Morning (8AM-12PM), Afternoon (12PM-5PM), or Evening (5PM-9PM).

question: Do you deliver outside India?
answer: Currently we only deliver within India. International shipping is on our roadmap for the next year.

question: How do I update my delivery address?
answer: You can update your address in your account settings. If an order is already placed, contact support quickly before it is dispatched.

question: What is your privacy policy?
answer: We collect only the data needed to process your orders and improve your experience. We do not sell your data to third parties. Full policy at quickserve.ai/privacy.
